title: Update edhoc_kdf to new KDF(prk, th, label_str, context, len) with exact CBOR info matching Python
description: Replace old numeric-label edhoc_kdf (lines ~242-303) with new implementation using string labels, explicit TH in every call, and CBOR sequence (uint(len), bstr(th), tstr(label), bstr(context)). Add helper CBOR appenders if needed. Match python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py exactly for interop.
